target_variable: task-specific legacy targets: advancement_label, grade_label, max_round_score, final_entry_label, tactical_style_label, key_lap_label, style_cluster, risk_score

prediction_output_meaning.classifiers: Predicted class label and class probabilities for the selected gender, distance, and task.
prediction_output_meaning.style_cluster: Cluster ID describing rhythm, pacing, and position-control style within the selected gender and distance.
prediction_output_meaning.risk_detection: Anomaly/risk score from lap variability, position instability, late-race deterioration, and total-time consistency.

label_rules.advancement_label: 1 when qual is one of Q, QA, QB, QAA, QAB, QBA, QBB, q, qA, qB, ADV, ADA, ADVA, ADVB; otherwise 0. Any Final round is excluded from advancement training.
label_rules.grade_label: Within each gender and distance, reconstructed total time is divided into quartiles; 3 is fastest/top quartile and 0 is slowest/bottom quartile. Grade models exclude total-time and direct mean-time features.
label_rules.max_round_score: For each athlete within the same gender, distance, and event URL, the maximum normalized round score reached is used as the label.
label_rules.final_entry_label: 1 when max_round_score reaches Ranking Finals, Final B, Finals, or Final A; otherwise 0.
label_rules.style_cluster: Unsupervised KMeans clusters from rhythm, pacing, and position-control features within each gender and distance.
label_rules.tactical_style_label: Rule-generated style label within each gender and distance.
label_rules.key_lap_label: Rule-generated lap number with the largest combined lap-time deviation, position-change, and final-transition signal.
label_rules.risk_detection: Unsupervised IsolationForest anomaly/risk score within each gender and distance.

missing_lap_rule: Rows are removed if any lap time or lap position is missing. If all lap times exist but official total time is missing, total time is filled from the lap-time sum and flagged.

official_total_time.note: Can be blank when all lap times are present; then it is reconstructed from lap sums.

round.note: Used for audit and advancement context; not sent as a model feature.

qual.note: Label source in training only; do not send as a prediction feature.

male_500m.standard: Use only this gender+distance reference group.
male_500m.competitive: If the predicted grade is 3 or the reconstructed/predicted performance indicator is at or faster than this group's fast quartile, describe the athlete as having strong competitiveness.
male_500m.near_elite_reference: If the predicted grade is 2 or the performance indicator is between the median and fast quartile, describe the athlete as close to the elite reference interval.
male_500m.needs_improvement: If the predicted grade is 0 or 1, or the performance indicator is slower than the group median, describe room for improvement.
male_500m.uncertainty: If sample_size_too_small is true, model metrics are weak, or class probabilities are low, state that prediction uncertainty is high and should be combined with coach assessment and recent race results.

female_500m.uncertainty: If sample_size_too_small is true, model metrics are weak, or class probabilities are low, state that prediction uncertainty is high and should be combined with coach assessment and recent race results.
